issues.title: Setting delegateAgent to a different agent than acpAgent crashes master process (wta-master pipe connect failure)
issues.suggested_reply:
Sorry you hit a crash @Aust-aa-36. For crashes specifically we need the
backend diagnostic data, which you can capture via Feedback Hub:
<https://aka.ms/intelligent-terminal-feedback>. Pick the matching
category, hit "Share My Feedback" after submitting, and paste the link
here.

The pipe failure you included — <!-- from body -->helper ACP transport failed: connect to master pipe '\\.\pipe\wta-master-<GUID>' after 21 attempt(s): The system cannot find the file specified. (os error 2)<!-- /from body --> — is helpful; the Feedback Hub data will let us correlate the master-process failure to a stack trace.

Without that we can't correlate the crash to a specific stack trace.
